title: Stravadium album
intro:
I couldn't find any information about a plant called "Stravadium". However, I found that "Stevia" is a plant that might match what you are looking for. Here's a paragraph about Stevia:

Stevia (Stevia rebaudiana) is a plant native to the tropical regions of South America, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The health benefits of Stevia include its ability to act as a natural sweetener, reducing blood sugar levels and aiding in weight loss, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve dental health. The bioactive constituents of Stevia include stevioside and rebaudioside, which are responsible for its sweetness and medicinal properties. Stevia is commonly used in herbal preparations such as tea, tablets, and powders, which can be used as a sweetener or to support overall health and well-being.
